ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publisher_details" TEXT /* Details of the publisher (e.g., journal name, volume, issue) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal, conference) */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the publication */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member responsible for the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal or conference */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the publication is open access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member leading the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's research focus and activities */,
  "chair_email" TEXT /* Email of the department chair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the faculty member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the faculty member */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the faculty member */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "auth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author entry */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication the author contributed to */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the author */,
  "corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the author is the corresponding author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation entry */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication being cited */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Count of citations for the publication */,
  "citation_year" INTEGER /* Year in which the citation occurred */,
  "cited_by" TEXT /* Title or identifier of the publication that cited this work */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Impact score of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
